title: Help Shape the Future of Burial Heritage: Contribute to the EXCALIBUR Survey
content:
Across Europe and beyond, burial sites and funerary landscapes represent some of the most sensitive and complex forms of cultural heritage. From archaeological excavation to digital documentation and ethical interpretation, professionals working in this field face unique challenges—ones that require innovative, well-informed solutions.

The EXCALIBUR Project, part of the European ECHOES EU initiative, is developing a new generation of open digital tools to support the study, preservation, and restoration of burial cultural heritage.

To ensure these tools truly respond to real-world needs, the project is inviting professionals to directly contribute to their design.
